note: Created ThreePeerMeshCommunicationTests.cs with 8 tests: 6 directional peer-pair communication tests (A↔B, A↔C, B↔C), 1 independent handshake verification test, and 1 comprehensive all-pairs test. Uses WgMeshTopology helper with unique payloads per pair for routing verification. Integration tests cannot be verified due to WireGuard environment unavailability.
